# Installing the required software and the `ebvcube` package {#sec-installation}

*Learning objectives: install R, RStudio, and `ebvcube` with all dependencies; verify the install.*

## Prerequisites

<!-- TODO: adapt installation.qmd "Prerequisites" -->

## Installing from CRAN

<!-- TODO: adapt installation.qmd "Installing the released version" -->

## Bioconductor dependencies

<!-- TODO: adapt installation.qmd "Bioconductor dependencies" -->

## Verifying your installation

<!-- TODO: adapt installation.qmd "Verifying your installation", using martins_comcom_subset.nc -->

**Checkpoint:** `library(ebvcube)` loads without error and `ebv_properties()` prints a dataset title.
